## Verification

- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v --tb=short`
- [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/`
- [ ] New or changed annotations include DOI-backed references
- [ ] README, Hugging Face card, citation metadata, and result files remain consistent

## Release surface

- [ ] No model-generated dangerous sequences, synthesis routes, expression vectors, or design protocols are disclosed
- [ ] No generated design FASTA/PDB outputs, embeddings, model weights, caches, or local HPC artifacts are tracked
- [ ] Public-facing text preserves the evaluation-framework and responsible-use scope
